sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method for multi-leg positions. Position size calculated as HPR^P where HPR = (1 + sum of leg contributions)^position_count. T and U parameters require iterative optimization. Formula-driven sizing with no fixed percentages specified in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position sizing for multiple simultaneous positions with causal relationships is calculated using the Holding Period Return (HPR) formula raised to the power of the position count, multiplied by the sum of all leg contributions.
